Careers

GMS welcomes applications for employment throughout the academic year. We look for experienced applicants who wish to join our professional team, one which is committed to the Montessori philosophy and upholds the highest academic standards. GMS offers its staff excellent working conditions, with competitive salaries and benefits, in a warm and nurturing environment, with ongoing curriculum support and professional development.

650 Lyon Street South, Ottawa, ON, K1S 3Z7 | (613) 237-3824 | gmsinfo@glebemontessori.ca
